title: exostema ixoroides subsp. maestrense
intro: Exostema ixoroides subsp. maestrense, also known as the Cuban lantana or mountain island lantana, is a plant species native to Cuba and the Isle of Youth. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Exostema ixoroides subsp. maestrense include its ability to treat various ailments, such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, and the plant's leaves are also used in topical applications to aid in wound healing.
